hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */dashboard/*) cd /Users/lasse/workspace/sleep_analysis/dashboard && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" ;; */backend/*|*/ble_service.py) ruff format --config /Users/lasse/workspace/sleep_analysis/ruff.toml "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
